settings.heading: Join StudioMine
settings.text:
An exclusive membership for Design & Build Professionals. 

Enjoy complimentary samples, exclusive trade pricing, early access to new products, and curated tools to help bring your boldest masonry visions to life.

settings.heading: Enjoy Exclusive Access
settings.text:
• Free Quick Ship Samples to keep projects moving
  • Discounted Pricing to maximize your margin and ease of doing business
  • Design Tools that help bring your vision to life
  • First Access to inspiring new colors, textures, and profiles
  • Designer Spotlights that celebrate and share your work
  • Dedicated Account Reps who know your business

settings.heading: Join the Creative Mines Trade Program
settings.subheading: Enjoy exclusive trade pricing, complimentary samples, and personalized support—all designed to help you bring your boldest visions to life.
